get.summary: Browse / Search all Organisations in the database.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of records to be retrieved.

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: How many records to skip when fetching the data. 0 means the first records will be fetched.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: SQL-like advanced query filter for the records.

parameters.name: envelope
parameters.description: When enabled, the retrieved records are wrapped into a JSON property (`data`). Otherwise, the results are retrieved as a basic JSON Array. Default value is `true`.

parameters.name: pagination
parameters.description: When enabled, the response includes the pagination metadata. Valid only when enveloping the records. Default value is `false`.

parameters.name: pretty
parameters.description: When enabled, the response is pretty-printed JSON. Otherwise, all newline and space separators are being stripped out. Good to save some processing time and bandwidth when dealing with really complex collections. Default value is `true`.

parameters.name: group
parameters.description: List of fields to group records by. Will output distinct values

parameters.name: echo
parameters.description: When enabled the response will include not only the Location header of the new record but also the actual record created.

parameters.name: pretty
parameters.description: When enabled, the response is pretty-printed JSON. Otherwise, all newline and space separators are being stripped out. Good to save some processing time and bandwidth when dealing with really complex collections. Default value is `true`.

get.summary: Retrieve MightyRep statistics

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: SQL-like advanced query filter for the records.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of records to be retrieved.

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: How many records to skip when fetching the data. 0 means the first records will be fetched.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: List of sorting requirements, comma separated. Sort is performed in the order of the fields provided, `-` sign in front of a field implies DESCENDING order, otherwise ASCENDING.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: List of fields to be retrieved. When left empty, all fields are retrieved.

parameters.name: group
parameters.description: List of fields to group records by. Will output distinct values

parameters.name: exclude
parameters.description: List of fields to be excluded from the records. Will override any default field or explicitly requested using the `fields` parameter.

parameters.name: envelope
parameters.description: When enabled, the retrieved records are wrapped into a JSON property (`data`). Otherwise, the results are retrieved as a basic JSON Array. Default value is `true`.

parameters.name: pagination
parameters.description: When enabled, the response includes the pagination metadata. Valid only when enveloping the records. Default value is `false`.

parameters.name: pretty
parameters.description: When enabled, the response is pretty-printed JSON. Otherwise, all newline and space separators are being stripped out. Good to save some processing time and bandwidth when dealing with really complex collections. Default value is `true`.
